commands.summary: Backend TypeScript build passed with schema v22 consent_ledger and evaluateContactConsent wired as the second gate in createOutboundDraft.

commands.command: node --test backend-dist/channels.test.js backend-dist/telnyx.test.js backend-dist/database.test.js backend-dist/migration.test.js backend-dist/server.test.js backend-dist/signals.test.js backend-dist/twilio.test.js
commands.summary: 97 backend tests passed, including the unknown/no-record/requires-review/channel/topic/allowed-hours paths, the agent-specific-over-wildcard override, review/delete, the two-gate auto-send (allow + consent), the v22 from-previous-shipped-schema upgrade, and operator-only route scoping.
Renderer TypeScript typecheck passed with the added ContactConsent/ContactConsentDecision types.
Local audit passed after AGH-021 implementation and ledger updates.

environment.process_note: AGH-021: external-contact consent ledger gating direct agent contact; unknown contacts default to no direct contact, and an allow firewall rule only auto-sends when consent also permits the channel/topic/time.
